channel.title: Featured on Travis Beckham
channel.description: Recent content in Featured on Travis Beckham

item.title: Minted Component Library
item.description: As Minted Wedding Websites moved from the legacy Hitched Up app to React, it gave me to opportunity to create a responsive component library from the ground up. This library has allowed our team build consistently, launch new features at a faster pace, and reduce internal miscommunication. The building blocks are broken down into four categories: Foundation contains the abstract properties such as font definitions, colors, grid structure, and spacing.
